sources.notes: Primary upstream repository: community model zoo and knowledge base for Apple Core AI.

sources.notes: Main source for model list, repository layout, throughput table, apps and license notes.

sources.notes: Community model cards for Core AI .aimodel conversions.
sources.title: coreai-model-zoo/zoo

sources.notes: Pre-converted models from Apple official recipes; distinct from community zoo ports.
sources.title: coreai-model-zoo/official

sources.notes: Primary source for official Apple recipe conversion list and Hugging Face links.
sources.title: coreai-model-zoo official README

sources.notes: Technical notes on conversion, compression, KV cache, AOT, compute units, Metal kernels, Swift runtime and model-specific topics.

sources.notes: Re-authored models and conversion/verification/compression scripts.

sources.notes: Swift package containing ZooFMProvider and CoreAIRunner.

sources.notes: SwiftUI on-device sample apps.

sources.notes: Official Apple Core AI model recipes referenced by upstream.

sources.notes: Hugging Face account hosting converted Core AI artifacts listed by upstream.

sources.notes: Raw benchmark data repository referenced by upstream official README.

sources.notes: CoreAIChatMac samples referenced by upstream official README.
sources.title: john-rocky/coreai-samples

sources.notes: Independent Whisper large-v3-turbo Core AI conversion with split encoder/decoder bundles.
sources.title: CarstenL/whisper-large-v3-turbo-coreai

sources.notes: Whisper tiny.en, medium, and large-v3-turbo Core AI variants in fp16/fp32.
sources.title: Intiser Whisper CoreAI conversions

sources.notes: First multimodal Gemma 4 Core AI conversion (text+image+audio). Custom conversion recipe extending coreai-models. Includes MTP draft model for speculative decoding. Used in Wyvern Chat.
sources.title: warshanks Gemma 4 12B CoreAI conversions

sources.notes: VibeVoice TTS and ASR conversion pipeline. Microsoft VibeVoice original weights. 0.5B/1.5B/7B TTS + ASR variants.
sources.title: gafiatulin VibeVoice CoreAI pipeline

sources.notes: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 streaming ASR with full AOT artifact matrix (iOS A19 + macOS M3-M5). Companion Swift package.
sources.title: mweinbach Nemotron 3.5 ASR CoreAI

sources.notes: Z-Image Turbo text-to-image and Real-ESRGAN super-resolution Core AI bundles. For CoreAIStudio.
sources.title: bryanbblewis11 CoreAI model conversions

sources.notes: Hosted Core AI artifacts for Lenitas app. Includes EfficientSAM3-TinyViT and SAM3 variants with SHA-256 verified download index.
sources.title: lenitas/coreai-artifacts

sources.notes: RWKV-7 Goose — pure-recurrent / linear-attention LLM. Original model upstream for the Core AI conversion.
